description: Bread spread with garlic butter or garlic-infused oil and toasted until crisp on the edges. It is commonly served alongside pasta, soup, or salad.
preparation_steps: Mix garlic with softened butter or oil.
Spread over sliced bread or a halved loaf.
Add herbs or cheese if desired.
Bake or toast until hot and lightly crisp.

health_advice.benefits: Can be satisfying in small portions and pairs well with vegetable-rich meals.
health_advice.risks: Butter, cheese, and refined bread can raise saturated fat, sodium, and calories.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use a moderate amount of spread and try whole-grain bread when suitable.

dietary_notes.note: Often vegetarian. Vegan versions are easy with olive oil or plant-based butter. Gluten-free versions require gluten-free bread.

allergens: Milk if butter or cheese is used
